mermaidSyntax:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Draft
  
  Draft --> InternalReview: Submit for co-author review
  InternalReview --> Draft: Revisions needed
  InternalReview --> Submitted: Approved by all co-authors
  
  Submitted --> UnderReview: Editor assigns reviewers
  
  UnderReview --> RevisionsRequested: Minor/major revisions
  UnderReview --> Accepted: No revisions needed
  UnderReview --> Rejected: Manuscript declined
  
  RevisionsRequested --> Resubmitted: Submit revised version
  Resubmitted --> UnderReview: Re-review begins
  
  Accepted --> InProduction: Copyediting & typesetting
  InProduction --> Published: Final publication
  
  Draft --> Withdrawn
  InternalReview --> Withdrawn
  Submitted --> Withdrawn
  UnderReview --> Withdrawn
  RevisionsRequested --> Withdrawn
  Resubmitted --> Withdrawn
  Accepted --> Withdrawn
  InProduction --> Withdrawn
  Rejected --> Withdrawn
  
  Published --> [*]
  Withdrawn --> [*]
  Rejected --> [*]

failures.suggestedFix:
Increase node width or use multi-line labels with
tags
